de.uka.ilkd.key.gui
This package contains classes forming the graphical user interface of KeY.

  • Uses of NotificationManager in de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.notification

    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.notification with parameters of type NotificationManager
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ExitKeYNotification.execute(NotificationEvent event, NotificationManager manager)
    overwritten as invokeAndWait is taken called to execute the notification task, but this method only takes care that we are in the even dispatcher thread
    void
    NotificationTask.execute(NotificationEvent event, NotificationManager manager)
    called to execute the notification task, but this method only takes care that we are in the even dispatcher thread
    protected void
    NotificationTask.executeActions(NotificationEvent event, NotificationManager manager)
    called to execute the notification task
